=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/missedPipeableOpportunity_preview.ts(7,24): warning TS377050: This nested call structure has a pipeable form. `Schema.decodeEffect(User)({ id: 1 }).pipe(...)` represents the same call sequence in pipe style and may be easier to read. effect(missedPipeableOpportunity)


==== /.src/missedPipeableOpportunity_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics missedPipeableOpportunity:warning
    // @test-config { "pipeableMinArgCount": 2 }
    import { identity, Schema } from "effect"
    
    const User = Schema.Struct({ id: Schema.Finite })
    export const preview = identity(identity(Schema.decodeEffect(User)({ id: 1 })))
                           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377050: This nested call structure has a pipeable form. `Schema.decodeEffect(User)({ id: 1 }).pipe(...)` represents the same call sequence in pipe style and may be easier to read. effect(missedPipeableOpportunity)
